author: Marc S.
pros: The flexibility which can cater to almost any use case imagineable. The building blocks (datamodel, datasets, forms, workflows, etc.) of the platform make sense, and allow for highly customised and unique processes.
cons: It's difficult to understand and set up everything at first, as there is so much that can be done. Also, you have to request additional permissions to gain more power. But they tend to only give these permissions when you request them, however you can't request what you don't know. So this is best to discuss with your account manager, and then they are happy to walk through it together.

description: Avature offers a robust platform for talent management and recruitment, providing customizable solutions that enhance user experience. Its intuitive interface and powerful analytics facilitate efficient workflows, making it a valuable tool for organizations aiming to streamline hiring processes and improve candidate engagement.
author: Prashana S.
pros: Avature is very reliable and customizable in sense on the workflows
cons: the feature request will take time to be actioned on

description: I'm a hiring manager trying to hire quality talent by using the Avature applicant tracking system. Overall, I would not recommend this software. In fact, our Talent Acquisition team just switched from Avature to iCIMS as they were not satisfied with this platform.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: When I learned how to use several features, Avature was quite easy to use. I was able to click from an automated email, review new candidates, and provide feedback.
cons: Navigation was very confusing. It was difficult to find some of the functionality I was looking for, so ultimately I just limited myself to the few tasks I knew how to complete in the platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, our company is very satisfied with Avature. We have very positive end user experiences for all types of users which was our goal. Like any software, there are challenges but the positives outweigh the negatives twofold.
author: Stephanie S.
pros: The ability to customize to meet our specific business needs. You would think with a SaaS you would be limited, but that has not been our experience with Avature. The ability to make updates to fields, workflows, views, portals, forms, templates, etc. is very easy and does not require a technical expert to make the changes.
cons: One of the challenges we face is keeping up with the enhancements and fully understanding how to use the enhancement in our instance. Some are very self explanatory and the explanations provided by Avature are easy to understand. Others, may require some additional training to determine if the enhancement is truly something you want to apply to your instance.

review_title: The best ATS/CRM in the market
description: Avature has helped us bring all of Talent Acquisition into one product, in one instance. We have achieved our goal of 'One Team, One System' in Avature. We now have the ability to expand an enhance our reporting and dashboard capabilities, streamline our sourcing and screening of candidates utilizing AI, and create a cohesive, top-notch candidate and hiring team experience.
author: Erica R.
pros: Avature's ATS and CRM functionalities are incredibly configurable and can accommodate a very diverse set of business capabilities. This has allowed us to create an instance that offers optionality, while keeping the various business processes in the same Product. This has been a game changer for our Talent Acquisition group!
cons: Avature's interviewing scheduling is quite manual - infusing this process with some AI, if possible, to make it a bit more user-friendly and automated would be helpful for us.

review_title: User friendly with powerful customization and configuration abilities
description: Overall, it's been a great collaborative experience with the Avature team, particularly during implementations. Our solution specialists have helped with creative ideas to our unique business issues. Once we moved over to our account team, the response times have been delayed and change requests have been taking much longer than expected to resolve.
author: Jason R.
pros: As a system admin, the options and capabalities are endless. A savvy admin can configure a workflow, forms, emails, datasets, and more on their own. The workflows, either in the ATS or CRM, can be customized for each of our unique business needs.
cons: The AI and advanced automation features are lacking. The tools are on the roadmap, but compared to their competitors they're behind. As an admin the inability to reassign or correct schema ids is frustrating, given we have multiple integration points with other systems.

description: Overall, it has been very positive! While we are still in the implementation stage we have been impressed with option to customize just about everything we need to be specific to our use case. We are excited for how this change to Avature will impact our team immediately and in the long term!
author: Adrianne M.
pros: Automation, ability to customize to your business need and configure processes in multiple ways. All of the features and functionality to help you work smarter and not harder.
cons: We cannot rename certain fields/sections or even folder/records to be a name that works for us. For instance, ideally we would have called a record/folder 'Restaurant' but were not able to do that. Access to certain system permissions without completing a certification class.

description: Avature is outstanding. You can use it for really any Recruiting, Onboarding and even Off-Boarding use case there is. Great tool and great support.
author: Maria S.
pros: Customer service and flexibility of the product
cons: There isn't much - it's been an outstanding tool and the backbone of our department.

description: Brilliant enterprise level ATS and CRM, with strong customer success and account management.
author: Graham J.
pros: Best configurability of an ATS for enterprise level clients
cons: Takes considerable knowledge to get the best out of it

description: My overall experience with Avature has been positive. I have used it for the last 8 years and have found it to be user-friendly and effective in managing our recruitment and employee data. It has provided us with the flexibility to meet our specific needs and has empowered us to be more self-sufficient through its robust certification and training programs.
author: Jessica C.
pros: What I like most about Avature is its flexibility and customizability. It’s not a “box solution,” but rather a highly adaptable platform that allows us to tailor it to our unique processes. Additionally, the ability to get certified and become self-sufficient in the system makes it easy to manage and maximize its value internally.
cons: Because Avature is so customizable, it can create a steeper learning curve for new users who aren’t familiar with its extensive configuration options. This can be challenging when onboarding new team members, as they often need additional support to understand the system’s capabilities.

description: Very positive, able to deliver key business functionality. Would like some more technical features.
author: Aaron K.
pros: Avature is highly modular, extensible, and scalable. It's a great mixture of self-service and admin driven features. I'm impressed with how the ongoing enhancements close functionality gaps, and open up new use cases. The Avature team is clearly committed to enhancing the product and solving user pain points.
cons: There are some bugs with things like lists and table fields in records. I would also like to see more enhancements to the custom report builder functionality. One example would be a custom color palette for visuals. Another would be some additional functions (mean), and the ability to nest aggregate functions which proves to be a limit for advanced analytics. I also think there's an opportunity for natural language processing (NLP) driven analytic and list capabilities.

review_title: One step to be the best!
description: I like it the way it serve as an advancement of candidate data storage, and platform to co-work on mandate with recruiter globally. But it feels like there is a lot potential on candidate engagement, and integration with other platform to be unleashed. In another word, good job to Avature that we're relying more on Avature than other applications, and hope Avature could incorporate other configurations soon.
author: Daniel C.
pros: Its configuration design is very relevant to recruiter - how we split pipeline/company/ people and etc, and therefore it's easy to understand and use.
cons: It doesn't seem to connect with other platform (LinkedIn, Workday in China) well, which leads to a lot of manual works importing and exporting data.

description: It's been good, especially when it comes with connecting to newer coworkers.
author: Camille K.
pros: I enjoy how interactive this platform is.
cons: It can be a little sticky to use. The interface looks a little outdated, and navigating it can be difficult.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Avature is very powerful, on the right path
author: Erica M.
pros: Avature is incredibly customizable. We selected Avature because we wanted to build in specific checkpoints and capture specific data points in our recruiting process and no other system could support our requirements like Avature can.
cons: The company is very siloed and it's extremely challenging to get the right help and customer service. You have to just get lucky that the person you are connected with happens to know how to solve your exact problem, otherwise you essentially don't get help.

review_title: The most customizable tool in the market
author: Erin P.
pros: Most of Avature's features and product solutions have the ability to customize for customers to get the most out of the tool. Processes can easily be improved as the tool can mold to the customer's needs. It has the ability to be agile in a would of constant change.
cons: The reporting features of a tool are typically difficult to understand and Avature is no different but they have many support options to get customers up to speed on how to navigate the reporting functionality.

author: Amber H.
pros: We use the system for campus & events. The ability to update and change the system quickly is great, also being an admin is awesome and many of the changes we are able to do without consulting our account manager. Seeing activity in real time. We often need to know where we stand with our recruiting from day to day and knowing that information we pull is up to date is so beneficial.
cons: Figure out a way to better integrate with our ATS system. currently it is very limited.

description: Great product, supported by a great account team and technical support.
author: George M.
pros: The Avature software is highly flexible and has key features that allow us to enforce candidate process, data capture and data reporting that are lacking in many other competitors.
cons: Very little to dislike, perhaps could be structured slightly differently for an RPO provider that manage multiple client work within one instance.

author: Le N.
pros: product was easy to navigate and automated workflow actions made day to day easier
cons: custom reports were not easy and intuitive to use - no training documents available to help understand the tool.

description: Overall, best product, used by our team, for the recruitment process
author: Abdul L.
pros: Comprehensive tool for using performance review, and recruitment process
cons: Duplication of profile/ applicants, could not traced.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It can do whatever you need it to do. Easy to use and train people on. Great overall tool for CRM.
cons: You have to pay for each and every little change. The way clients are managed is different too based on your acocunt level, so your customer service can vary widely.

review_title: Excellent user experience with strong customer support. Our team uses everyday.
author: Bill F.
pros: Flexibility and adaptability. Very easy to edit workflows and train new employees. Upgrades and features continue to add value to our user experience.
cons: We would look forward to having a better mobile experience and more advanced mobile features for our team. Currently, unable to access some mobility unless on an Iphone.

review_title: Great product with many advanced features.
author: Kristie H.
pros: The ability to customize Avature to fit the needs of both novice and advanced users. I also like how quickly you can set up pipelines, add prospects and send out email campaigns.
cons: It has been a challenge to get all of the recruiters to use Avature as it is not integrated with our ATS. Even though the program is fairly easy to use many still find it a bit too confusing.

review_title: We are new users/purchasers and our experiences to date have been excellent. Great support and easy
author: Brian M.
pros: extremely flexible, agile and easy to use--it is conforming to our complex business needs. We are looking forward to maximizing the power of the software.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great ATS and CRM solutions with a dedicated support team :).
description: I have worked with Avature solutions fos 3 years now, to handle applications tracking for new resources and it is easy to use and configure, and I received a great support from the compamy.
author: Clara R.
pros: I love avature CRM, I have configured and tested the ATS and CRM solutions with great features for candidate interview, emproyee management and applicant management. It also has a great customer support.
cons: Some workflows can be harder to setup, if the business logic is too complex, but in general I liked the solution.

description: Avature is perhaps the best ATS out there due to its ability to empower its admins and users with the ability to build and configure their own solutions. As an HRIS admin, the depth of the tools available in Avature has challenged me and allowed me to grow new skills in my career path. Avature has been overall, a great system to manage and our firm has benefited greatly from it. Avature's customer service can be quite good. A special shout out to [sensitive content hidden] who has been an outstanding partner to work with and has always advocated for our firm's positions on several cases and projects. [sensitive content hidden]'s technical understanding as well as his straight to business attitude has made for an unmatched experience with the platform. Thanks [sensitive content hidden] !
author: Rob W.
pros: Avature's configurability and its wide array of tools make it a powerful system for an experienced HRIS admin. In the right hands, with thoughtful implementation and maintenance, Avature could very well be the best ATS out there.
cons: Limitations on data reporting and exporting are definately something that set avature apart in not the best way. Such as exporting limits on users and column limits on custom reports. I understand system stability being the concern, but we don't have any other system in our stack with this kind of limitation.
